title: After exporting an excel using the following code, if I try to upload the .xlsx file to a laravel backend, it says "The file must be a file of type: pdf, doc, docx, ods, xlsx, xls, ppt, pptx."
author: anish-techpro

comments.author: anish-techpro
comments.body: Please respond. I am in the middle of a project where I need to implement an "Export" feature, which I did using this package. But when I am trying to upload the exported file, I am getting validation error & upload fails. Help is very much appreciated

not yet.
